questionHtml: Deduce, giving a reason, whether the atom economy of a condensation polymerization, such as this, would be greater or less than an addition polymerization, such as the formation of HDPE.
markschemeHtml:
less AND a second molecule/product formed

 

Accept “not all the reactant molecules «in the equation» are converted «to product molecules»”.

[1 mark]
